name: construction project managers handling 5–10 projects simultaneously tool
description: For construction project managers processing 5–10 projects simultaneously, unclear project plans cause miscommunication among stakeholders. We provide 3D visualizations instead of 2D blueprints and manual sketches.
target_audience: construction project managers handling 5–10 projects simultaneously
problem_solved: Difficulty in visualizing project plans leads to miscommunication among stakeholders.
features: Basic collaboration tools for team feedback
